caption: A person with blond hair and a navy blue shirt is seen in a small inset window, speaking while navigating a football game menu on a screen. The game interface features a stadium background with "SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS" displayed on a large banner. Text at the top reads "MMG" and "HOLD THE LINE ENABLED!". A play-selection menu is visible, containing options such as "COACH SUGGESTIONS," "FORMATION," "CONCEPT," and specific plays like "WHEEL POST DRAG" and "FOUR VERTICALS." A football player in a white uniform and helmet is positioned on the field in the background. As the scene progresses, the menu disappears, and the view transitions to a live gameplay sequence. Players in white and black uniforms are lined up at the scrimmage line on a green grass field. The top HUD now shows "MADDEN 23," the game clock at "1:57," and the play clock at ":23."
